name: shadcn-ui-framework
description: Original shadcn/ui blocks emitted by the shadcn-ui-framework pattern atlas.

items.name: site-nav
items.title: Site navigation
items.description: Sticky primary nav anchored by a wordmark, with a single primary CTA and an optional ghost CTA.

items.name: hero-split-code
items.title: Hero with code panel
items.description: Split layout with copy on the left and a syntax-shaped code panel on the right. Implements the developer-tools hero/split-code-right pattern.

items.name: hero-agent-demo
items.title: Hero with agent transcript
items.description: Split hero anchored by a static agent transcript. Implements the ai-agent-saas hero/agent-demo-box pattern.

items.name: hero-enterprise-split
items.title: Enterprise outcome hero
items.description: Outcome headline with a Tailwind-built dashboard placeholder. Implements the enterprise-b2b hero/talk-to-sales-headline pattern.

items.name: logo-strip-mono
items.title: Monochrome logo strip
items.description: Caller-owned logo marks rendered as an accessible monochrome strip directly under a hero.

items.name: quote-cards-three
items.title: Three quote cards
items.description: Three customer quote cards with figure / figcaption semantics, optional portrait or company glyph.

items.name: feature-grid-three
items.title: Three-pillar feature grid
items.description: Three feature cards anchored under a single value pillar. icon-top or icon-leading variants.

items.name: feature-grid-four
items.title: Four-pillar platform overview
items.description: Four-card platform overview with optional per-card 'Learn more' affordance.

items.name: feature-deep-dive
items.title: Feature deep dive
items.description: Extended single-feature explanation with a media aside (media-right or media-left).

items.name: use-case-role-grid
items.title: Use-case role grid
items.description: 3–6 use-case cards titled by role or workflow. Implements the ai-agent-saas use-cases/role-card-grid pattern.

items.name: pricing-tier-table
items.title: Tiered pricing table
items.description: 3–4 pricing tiers with fixed-amount or label-only prices and an optional emphasized tier.

items.name: usage-calculator
items.title: Usage calculator
items.description: Interactive single- or multi-meter calculator with a transparent line-item breakdown. Implements the usage-based-saas pricing/usage-calculator pattern.

items.name: conversion-band
items.title: Conversion band
items.description: Centered or asymmetric full-width conversion band. Covers the conversion patterns across all four atlases.
